name: S-23 Sierpinski RPG
description:
Welcome to our facility. You've caught us at a fortunate time.

What Is This: an extensive open-ended RPG bot based on SIGNALIS focused in S-23 Sierpinski from the game, but set before all that funky stuff happens. All 9 known Replika types are in the code, although LSTRs are mentioned to not be stationed at Sierpinski. Map information included in the code for all 8 sublevels based on the location in game. You can play as a Gestalt, Replika, or whatever it is you want.

Some Yapping: I've been wanting to make this ever since I created The Martyr, but have been intimidated by the sheer size of the world and lore of Signalis as well as my own inexperience with creating bots like this. Definitely my heaviest public bot, sorry about the token size.
creator: FlatConnoisseur
